mapper.sql: bg.id, bg.gate_no, bg.community_id, bg.device_no, bg.door_location, bg.device_position, bg.screen_position, bg.lightbox_direction
mapper.select: SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM barrier_gate bg LEFT JOIN community c ON bg.community_id = c.id WHERE bg.id = #{id}
SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM barrier_gate bg LEFT JOIN community c ON bg.community_id = c.id WHERE bg.gate_no = #{gateNo}
SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM barrier_gate bg LEFT JOIN community c ON bg.community_id = c.id ORDER BY bg.id DESC
SELECT , c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM barrier_gate bg LEFT JOIN community c ON bg.community_id = c.id WHERE bg.community_id = #{communityId} ORDER BY bg.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO barrier_gate ( gate_no, community_id, device_no, door_location, device_position, screen_position, lightbox_direction ) VALUES
(#{item.gateNo}, #{item.communityId}, #{item.deviceNo}, #{item.doorLocation}, #{item.devicePosition}, #{item.screenPosition}, #{item.lightboxDirection})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM barrier_gate WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM barrier_gate bg LEFT JOIN community c ON bg.community_id = c.id WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM plan_barrier pb WHERE pb.barrier_gate_id = bg.id AND pb.release_status IN (2, 3, 4) AND ( (pb.release_date_begin <= #{endDate} AND pb.release_date_end >= #{beginDate}) ) )
AND c.city = #{city}
